core.title: Core data
core.subtitle: Everything needed to run the app — cities, visas, costs, flights, advisories.

pois.title: Attractions
pois.subtitle: Per-city points of interest with names, descriptions, and coordinates from Wikivoyage "See" and "Do" listings. Powers the per-city attractions list. (The off-the-beaten-path filter and the attractions map mode use a separate count baked into the core bundle, so they work without this.)

cities.label: City catalogue
cities.subtitle: 21,589 cities with population, country, music tier, and a short description.

pois.label: Attractions
pois.subtitle: Per-city points of interest with names, descriptions, and coordinates from Wikivoyage "See" and "Do" listings.

passport.label: Visa requirements
passport.subtitle: Bilateral visa matrix for 199 passport / destination pairs.

schengen.label: Schengen Area
schengen.subtitle: Schengen member states and the 90/180 stay rule.

cost_of_living.label: Cost of living
cost_of_living.subtitle: Numbeo index by city, NYC = 100. Powers the Cost map mode and affordability badges.

direct_flights.label: Direct flights
direct_flights.subtitle: Non-stop route adjacency from OpenFlights — powers the "Direct flights from anchor" filter.

ra_urls.label: Resident Advisor events
ra_urls.subtitle: City → Resident Advisor area mapping. Powers the events sheet on city pages.

fcdo_slugs.label: UK FCDO travel advice
fcdo_slugs.subtitle: ISO → FCDO URL slug map; lets the advisory card link to gov.uk per country.

weather.label: Weather
weather.subtitle: Current conditions and 7-day forecast for every city, fetched live (no bundle to install).
